title: Install Replacement Tipper Onto Existing Sub-Plate
summary: Install a new tipper onto the existing sub-plate, reconnect the documented conduit, power, air, and Ethernet connections to the column and control box, reinstall related components and panels as needed, and restart the operator station.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when replacing a tipper and the documented installation portion is required to restore the station after the old tipper has been removed and the existing sub-plate remains in place.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as a complete tipper replacement procedure; the source packet only supports the installation portion.
Do not use this runbook when detailed torque values, alignment checks, or verification criteria are required; those details are not provided in the source.
Do not use this runbook as a substitute for the referenced gripper replacement or operator-station starting procedures.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the tipper installation, reconnect services and components, reinstall panels as needed, and restart the operator station using the referenced procedure.

safety_notes: PPE identified in the candidate: safety glasses and gloves.
This procedure is not marked support-safe in the candidate because it involves equipment replacement and reconnection of power, air, Ethernet, and mechanical components.
If installation cannot be completed using the documented connections and referenced procedures, escalate.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the tipper, existing sub-plate, column, control box, and side panels
Referenced procedure: Starting The Operator Station

access_required: Access to the tipper, existing sub-plate, column, control box, and side panels
system_preconditions: Existing sub-plate is available for installation of the replacement tipper.
Referenced gripper replacement procedure is available if the gripper must be mounted.
Referenced operator-station starting procedure is available for restart.

steps.title: Install the new tipper onto the existing sub-plate
steps.purpose: Mount the replacement tipper back onto the machine using the existing sub-plate so restoration can continue.
steps.instruction: Install the new tipper onto the existing sub-plate.
steps.expected_result: The replacement tipper is mounted onto the existing sub-plate.
steps.healthy_condition: The new tipper is physically installed on the existing sub-plate and ready for reconnection of services and components.
steps.failure_condition: The tipper cannot be mounted onto the existing sub-plate or cannot be positioned for the remaining installation steps.

actions.label: Mount replacement tipper
actions.exact_action: Install the new tipper onto the existing sub-plate.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: General A-axis/tipper mechanical assembly area for orientation during installation.
General counterbalance assembly location on the tipper for mechanical orientation.

stop_or_escalate_if: The replacement tipper cannot be installed onto the existing sub-plate.
The installation cannot be completed with the documented connections and referenced procedures.

source_evidence.text: Install the new tipper onto the existing sub-plate.
Install a new tipper onto the existing sub-plate and reconnect the documented services and components so the operator station can be restarted.

steps.title: Reconnect conduit, power, air, and Ethernet
steps.purpose: Restore the required service and communication connections between the installed tipper, the column, and the control box.
steps.instruction: Connect the conduit, power, air, and Ethernet to the column and control box.
steps.expected_result: The documented conduit, power, air, and Ethernet connections are restored to the column and control box.
steps.healthy_condition: Conduit, power, air, and Ethernet are connected to the column and control box as documented.
steps.failure_condition: Any required conduit, power, air, or Ethernet connection cannot be completed or connection points cannot be identified from the available documentation.

actions.label: Connect conduit
actions.exact_action: Connect the conduit to the column and control box.

actions.label: Connect power
actions.exact_action: Connect power to the column and control box.

actions.label: Connect air
actions.exact_action: Connect air to the column and control box.

actions.label: Connect Ethernet
actions.exact_action: Connect Ethernet to the column and control box.

stop_or_escalate_if: Any required conduit, power, air, or Ethernet connection cannot be completed.
The documented connections and referenced procedures are insufficient to complete installation.

source_evidence.text: Connect the conduit, power, air, and Ethernet to the column and control box.

This candidate captures the documented installation portion of tipper replacement, including mounting the new tipper, reconnecting conduit, power, air, and Ethernet, reinstalling related components, and restarting the operator station.

steps.title: Mount the gripper if necessary
steps.purpose: Restore the gripper assembly when the installation requires it.
steps.instruction: Mount the gripper, if necessary, using the referenced gripper replacement procedure.
steps.expected_result: The gripper is mounted when required.
steps.healthy_condition: If the gripper is required, it is installed using the referenced gripper replacement procedure; if not required, this step is not needed.
steps.failure_condition: The gripper is required but cannot be mounted using the referenced procedure.

actions.label: Mount gripper
actions.exact_action: Mount the gripper, if necessary, using the referenced gripper replacement procedure.

stop_or_escalate_if: The gripper is required but the referenced gripper replacement procedure is unavailable.
The gripper cannot be mounted using the referenced procedure.

source_evidence.text: Mount the gripper, if necessary, using the referenced gripper replacement procedure.

steps.title: Reinstall top and or bottom side panels if necessary
steps.purpose: Restore guarding or access panels removed during replacement work.
steps.instruction: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.
steps.expected_result: Any required top and/or bottom side panels are reinstalled.
steps.healthy_condition: All necessary side panels are back in place.
steps.failure_condition: Required side panels cannot be reinstalled or panel restoration is incomplete.

actions.label: Reinstall side panels
actions.exact_action: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.

stop_or_escalate_if: Required side panels cannot be reinstalled.
Panel restoration cannot be completed with the available documentation.

source_evidence.text: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.

steps.title: Restart the operator station
steps.purpose: Return the station to operation after installation and reconnection are complete.
steps.instruction: Re-start the operator station using the referenced starting procedure.
steps.expected_result: The operator station is restarted using the referenced procedure.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator station has been restarted after installation is complete.
steps.failure_condition: The operator station cannot be restarted using the referenced starting procedure.

actions.label: Restart operator station
actions.exact_action: Re-start the operator station using the referenced starting procedure.

success_criteria: The replacement tipper is installed on the existing sub-plate.
The documented conduit, power, air, and Ethernet connections are restored.
The gripper is mounted if required.
The top and/or bottom side panels are reinstalled if required.
healthy_conditions: Replacement tipper is installed on the existing sub-plate.
Required connections to the column and control box are restored.
Related components and panels are restored as needed.
Operator station restart completes using the referenced procedure.
failure_conditions: The replacement tipper cannot be installed on the existing sub-plate.
Required conduit, power, air, or Ethernet connections cannot be completed.
The gripper cannot be mounted when required.
Required side panels cannot be reinstalled.
The operator station cannot be restarted using the referenced procedure.
The source does not provide detailed torque values, alignment checks, or verification details.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the installation cannot be completed with the documented connections and referenced procedures.
Escalate when required referenced procedures are unavailable.
Escalate if any required mechanical, electrical, pneumatic, or Ethernet reconnection cannot be completed.
